headline: Georgia Power encourages customers to be storm ready this May
summary: As temperatures heat up and summer storm season approaches, Georgia Power is encouraging customers across the state to take steps now to stay safe and be prepared for severe weather, including thunderstorms that can bring heavy rain, lightning, strong winds and potential power outages.

raw.headline: Georgia Power encourages customers to be storm ready this May

headline: This Boring Utility ETF Just Became a Stealth AI Play, and It’s Up 20%
summary: For most of its life, the Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLU) was the financial equivalent of a thermostat. You set it, you forgot it, and it quietly produced a check every quarter while the rest of your portfolio did the interesting work. headline: Southern Company Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Southern Company has underperformed the broader market over the past year, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
